CAREERS

JOIN THE
9ROUND
TEAM
LEAD THE WAY

Want to help people show up stronger every day? Join a high-energy team that empowers members to live better lives through kickboxing fitness, nutrition and community.

OUR CULTURE

As a family owned and operated business, we believe that people should feel fulfilled when they’re at work. We want our team members to find a sense of belonging when they join 9Round. Our franchise model gives potential employees the opportunity to find a studio they can thrive in, and our business model gives people the satisfaction of knowing they’re helping people transform their lives and grow healthier every day.

OUR MISSION

From the CEO to the instructors in our boutique fitness studios, we're all about making members stronger physically and mentally, so they can show up every day ready to fight.

ABOUT 9ROUND

9Round has been delivering fast, effective kickboxing workouts for more than 10 years. Founded in 2008 by husband and wife, Shannon and Heather Hudson, in Greenville, South Carolina, the circuit training format provides a killer workout in just 30 minutes. With more than 600 locations in 17 countries across the globe, 9Round continues to gain popularity as people search for a workout that they don't have to schedule their lives around. With no

JOIN OUR TEAM

At 613 Electric, we believe great companies are built by great people – and we’re always looking for skilled, motivated individuals to grow with us. Whether you’re an experienced electrician or just starting your career in the trade, you’ll find a supportive environment, opportunities to learn, and team that values quality workmanship and professionalism.

We take pride in our work, our clients, and the people who represent our company every day. If you’re passionate about the electrical field and driven to deliver top-quality results, we’d love to hear from you.

Join our team!

At 5N Plus we are building a culture of innovation, collaboration and growth. We are looking for passionate individuals ready to make an impact. Explore our open positions and submit your application today.

OUR JOB POSTINGS
Why Work at 5N Plus?

At 5N Plus, our mission is to be critical to our customers, valued by our employees and trusted by our shareholders. Find out more about how this translates in our day-to-day work and corporate culture

Our
Culture
Career Development

To ensure we have the talented resources we need to realise our vision, we provide stimulating career opportunities, training, continuous learning through projects and assignments to our people to develop and prepare for their next challenge.

A Preferred Employer, Driving Innovation

Success starts with the right talent and we are fortunate to have some of the best resources in our industry to generate innovative ideas for our customers. This, combined with a high level of employee engagement, enables us to efficiently deliver high quality products to our clients and prepare for future business opportunities.

Respect in Meeting Employee Needs

JOIN OUR TEAM

Build your career working on real engineering challenges — where precision, accountability, and performance matter.

Why Work At ABCO
A CULTURE OF EXCELLENCE


We work on projects that require precision, accountability, and real problem-solving.

Whether in engineering, fabrication, or operations, every role contributes directly to building solutions that perform in demanding environments.

At ABCO, you’re not just part of a team — you’re part of delivering work that matters.

“Having the right attitude is very important. If you have the right attitude, we’re willing to train and promote you. We’ll provide what you need to do your job properly. ”

— GRAHAM GERHARDT – PRESIDENT, ABCO
